advisory.reason: Baseline threshold (0.3) already yielded 50 nodes. Lowering threshold is likely unnecessary noise.

pilot_evaluation.reason: Uncertain topology or borderline metrics - Manual calibration needed.

model_policy_reason: Production Policy v1: Haiku-only due to graph density ceiling

questions.question: What is the purpose of the GL Hub Software Development Kit?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the GL Hub SDK allows vendors to develop applications for GL Hub devices, including querying hub information, sending vendor commands, and updating firmware.

questions.question: What are the steps to open and execute the GL Hub driver?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides the steps to open the OpenGLHubDriver V2.2.0 folder and execute the GLHubDriver_v2.2.0.exe file, as well as click the Driver Ver 2.2 button.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the HID Code Sign record?
questions.justification: The synthesis text mentions the HID Code Sign record, but does not provide details on its purpose, only stating that it provides information related to HID firmware updates.

unsupported_claims.reason: The source document does not mention executing the GLHubDriver_v2.2.0.exe file.

suppression_decision.reason: Majority-unsupported Derived tier: 8/10 (80%). Derived claims cannot be collectively trusted as source-derived.
